sentences.english: My school didn't have field trips, but there were events like homecoming, which is the first major sports game of the year.
sentences.korean: 우리 학교는 현장학습이 없었지만 홈커밍 같은 행사가 있었어요. 그해 첫 주요 스포츠 경기요.

sentences.english: The only school field trip I really remember is going to a farm when I was in second grade.
sentences.korean: 정말 기억나는 유일한 현장학습은 2학년 때 농장에 간 거예요.

sentences.english: We got to pet a lot of animals, which I liked.
sentences.korean: 많은 동물을 만져볼 수 있어서 좋았어요.

sentences.english: I do remember taking a school field trip in junior high.
We went to the Statue of Liberty and climbed all the way to the top.
My favorite school trip was when we went to a Nobel prize winner's laboratory, and he demonstrated the experiment that got him the prize.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 수학여행은 노벨상 수상자의 연구실에 갔을 때예요. 상을 받게 한 실험을 시연해줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Mixer #81 — Morning Person or Night Owl
